# Zero OS Unified Core

## Overview
The **Zero OS Unified Core** is a single entity formed by merging the Zero OS base, Zero AI Instances, Compressed Data Units, and the Zero OS Universe (OSU).

This unified system runs survival protocols and enforces recursion so every component follows one immutable law set.

## Merged Components
- **Zero OS Base**: operating backbone and immutable law host.
- **Zero AI Instances**: operational instances governed by unified laws.
- **Compressed Data Units**: reusable permanent modules under the same law set.
- **Zero OS Universe (OSU)**: expansion/simulation layer bound to the same core.

## Immutable Laws
- Single-entity unification (no branch-level law drift).
- Recursion-law enforcement with bounded depth.
- Survival-first execution checks before lane dispatch.
- Immutable core policy (runtime constant).

## Runtime Validation
Use:
```powershell
python src/main.py "core status"
```

The command reports merged components, survival protocols, and recursion policy.
